title: Braintree Subscription
description: Represents a recurring billing subscription that automatically charges a customer's vaulted payment method on a schedule defined by a billing plan. Subscriptions support configurable trial periods, add-ons and discounts, and mid-cycle proration. Status changes are communicated through webhook notifications.

id.description: Unique identifier for the subscription. Auto-generated by Braintree if not specified at creation.

plan_id.description: Identifier of the billing plan this subscription is based on. Must match a plan configured in the Braintree Control Panel.

status.description: The current lifecycle status of the subscription.

price.description: The amount charged per billing cycle as a decimal string. May override the plan's base price.

merchant_account_id.description: Identifier of the Braintree merchant account used to process this subscription's charges.

payment_method_token.description: Token of the vaulted payment method charged each billing cycle.

current_billing_cycle.description: The current billing cycle number, starting at 1 on the first charge.

number_of_billing_cycles.description: Total number of billing cycles before the subscription expires. Null if the subscription never expires.

never_expires.description: If true, this subscription continues indefinitely regardless of the plan's number_of_billing_cycles setting.

trial_period.description: Whether this subscription includes a trial period before the first charge.

trial_duration.description: Duration of the trial period, measured in units specified by trial_duration_unit.

first_billing_date.description: Date of the first billing charge. Subscriptions created with this date begin in Pending status until the date arrives.

next_billing_date.description: Date of the next scheduled billing charge.

next_billing_amount.description: Amount that will be charged on the next billing date, including applied add-ons and discounts.

paid_through_date.description: The date through which the subscription has been paid. The next billing date is typically the day after this date.

billing_day_of_month.description: Day of the month on which recurring charges occur. Valid values are 1–28 or 31 (31 means the last day of the month).

failure_count.description: Number of consecutive failed billing attempts for the current billing cycle.

add_ons.description: Add-ons currently applied to this subscription that increase the billing amount.

discounts.description: Discounts currently applied to this subscription that decrease the billing amount.

transactions.description: The most recent transactions associated with this subscription, up to 20.

descriptor.description: Dynamic descriptor fields for this subscription's charges on the customer's statement.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the subscription was created, in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the subscription was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

AppliedModification.description: An add-on or discount currently applied to a subscription, with its effective amount and billing cycle scope.

id.description: Identifier matching the base add-on or discount definition in the Braintree Control Panel.

description.description: Description of what this add-on or discount represents.

amount.description: Amount applied per billing cycle as a decimal string.

never_expires.description: If true, this modification continues indefinitely.

number_of_billing_cycles.description: Total number of billing cycles this modification applies. Null if it never expires.

current_billing_cycle.description: The billing cycle on which this modification began, used to track remaining cycles.

quantity.description: Number of times this add-on amount is applied per billing cycle.

TransactionSummary.description: A brief summary of a transaction associated with a subscription.

amount.description: Transaction amount as a decimal string.

subscription_id.description: Identifier of the subscription this transaction belongs to.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this transaction was created.

Descriptor.description: Dynamic descriptor fields that appear on the cardholder's bank or credit card statement to identify the charge.

name.description: Merchant name as it appears on the customer's statement.

phone.description: Merchant phone number as it appears on the customer's statement.

url.description: Merchant URL as it appears on the customer's statement.
